reference: I went to the hospital last week for pain in my lower right abdomen. I had been sick two weeks before, and my stool had been irregular for a while. The doctor immediately thought I had ruptured my appendix two weeks ago. After blood work and a computed tomography scan, they found nothing wrong. I still have pain in the same area, and my stool is still irregular. What is wrong?
